title: Titan Eyeplus is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Titan Eyeplus is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Titan Eyeplus family as a E-commerce Executive in Hyderabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Titan Eyeplus:
Titan Eyeplus is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Titan Eyeplus!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
